witnesses.description: A two-dimensional exact-rational l1 triangle inequality witness.
A 2x2 matrix operator bound using the infinity norm and row-sum norm.
Exact values of T0 through T3 at x = 1/2.

checks.claim: The listed finite-dimensional vectors satisfy the l1 triangle inequality.
checks.notes: The validator recomputes the vector sum and all l1 norms exactly.

checks.claim: The listed vector sum has l1 norm at most 4.
checks.notes: Exact norm replay computes ||u+v||_1 = 5, while the malformed row claims it is at most 4. The separate qf-lra-bad-l1-sum-norm row owns the proof-object refutation.

checks.claim: The fixed malformed finite-operator l1 norm upper-bound claim is linearly inconsistent.

data.certificate: The resource regression parses the source SMT-LIB artifact, emits UnsatFarkas evidence, and independently checks the certificate.

checks.notes: The Axeyum regression refutes sum_norm = 5 together with sum_norm <= 4 using rechecked Farkas evidence.

checks.claim: The listed matrix-vector image satisfies the row-sum/infinity-norm operator bound.
checks.notes: The validator recomputes Ax, the row-sum norm, and the infinity norms exactly.

checks.claim: The listed Chebyshev values at x = 1/2 satisfy the finite recurrence.
checks.notes: The validator checks T0, T1, and every listed recurrence step exactly.

checks.claim: The listed Chebyshev prefix at x = 1/2 cannot have T3 equal to -1/2.
checks.notes: Exact recurrence replay computes T3(1/2) = -1, while the malformed row claims T3(1/2) = -1/2. The separate qf-lra-bad-chebyshev-t3 row owns the proof-object refutation.

checks.claim: The fixed malformed finite Chebyshev T3 value claim is linearly inconsistent.

data.certificate: The resource regression parses the source SMT-LIB artifact, emits UnsatFarkas evidence, and independently checks the certificate.

checks.notes: The Axeyum regression refutes the shifted Chebyshev equality conflict using rechecked Farkas evidence.

checks.claim: The listed matrix-vector image has infinity norm at most 2.
checks.notes: Exact operator replay computes ||A*x||_infty = 3 and row-sum bound 6, while the malformed row claims the image norm is at most 2. The separate qf-lra-bad-operator-bound row owns the proof-object refutation.

checks.claim: The fixed malformed finite-operator image-norm upper-bound claim is linearly inconsistent.

data.certificate: The resource regression parses the source SMT-LIB artifact, emits UnsatFarkas evidence, and independently checks the certificate.

checks.notes: The Axeyum regression refutes image_norm = 3 together with image_norm <= 2 using rechecked Farkas evidence.
